entity.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange with built-in trading bots launched in June 2019 and continuing to operate through the global Pionex platform.
entity.notes: An independent agreed-upon-procedures report commissioned by Pionex identifies June 2019 as the launch month. HEI retains the existing Singapore origin pending clearer public evidence for the global platform's contracting legal entity.

expected.summary: Singapore-based centralized exchange launched in 2019 and still operating under the Pionex brand.

changes.summary: Centralized cryptocurrency exchange with built-in trading bots launched in June 2019 and continuing to operate through the global Pionex platform.
changes.notes: An independent agreed-upon-procedures report commissioned by Pionex identifies June 2019 as the launch month. HEI retains the existing Singapore origin pending clearer public evidence for the global platform's contracting legal entity.

events.title: Pionex launched its exchange with built-in trading bots
events.description: Pionex launched its centralized cryptocurrency exchange with integrated trading bots in June 2019.
events.notes: The reviewed sources establish June 2019 but not an exact day, so the first day of the month is used as a month-level marker.

evidence.title: Agreed-Upon Procedures Report with regards to the Proof of Reserves Procedures of Pionex
evidence.publisher: Moore Blockchain and Digital Assets JHB
evidence.notes: The independent report states that the Pionex exchange with built-in trading bots launched in June 2019.

evidence.title: 15 Reddit Questions About Crypto Trading Bots and Pionex (Answered with Real Data)
evidence.notes: Pionex states that the platform has operated since 2019.

evidence.title: Pionex official exchange
evidence.notes: The official domain verifies the current Pionex identity and active exchange interface.
